# Portfolio repository

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Importing map structure
library(fs)
library(here)

# Importing image files
library(png)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)

```

```{r file_structure, echo=FALSE}

fs::dir_tree("~/documents/dsfb2/dsfb2_workflows_portfolio/dsfb2_workflows_portfolio")

```


```{r readme, echo=FALSE}

readme_3b <-  rasterGrob(as.raster(readPNG("~/dsfb2/dsfb2_workflows_portfolio/dsfb2_workflows_portfolio/projecten/3b_portfolio_repository/readme_screenshot.png")))
grid.arrange(readme_3b, ncol=1, top=textGrob("README from the portfolio repository:", gp=gpar(fontsize=20,font=8)))

```
